title: Ariadne Validation Report v1
description: Result of validating a drawing/extraction/patch against a set of gates. The canonical home of the entity-count truth gate (e.g. extracted entities[] length == asserted modelspace_count == cross-engine count). status is the overall verdict; gates[] is the per-gate breakdown where each gate carries its own pass/fail plus expected/actual evidence so a failure is never silent. errors[]/warnings[] aggregate issues; artifacts[] references supporting files. additionalProperties true for extension.

subject_ref.description: What was validated (a DWG, an IR document, an extract, a patch result, or a diff).

status.description: Overall verdict. pass = all required gates passed. fail = at least one required gate failed. partial = some non-required gates failed / partial coverage. blocked = validation could not run (missing input/host); never report pass when a required gate did not actually execute (no-fake-success).

gates.description: Per-gate results. Each gate has an id, a status, and expected vs actual evidence. The entity-count truth gate lives here (gate id e.g. 'entity_count_truth').

artifacts.description: Supporting artifacts (extract JSON, IR doc, logs).

id.description: Gate identifier (e.g. entity_count_truth, coordinate_payloads_present, cross_engine_agreement, postconditions_met).

required.description: When true, a failed gate forces overall status fail. When false, a failure only downgrades to partial.

evidence_ref.description: Path/id of evidence backing this gate (e.g. the extract JSON that yielded actual).
